messages.content: # If you are using a PS4 or PS5 controller, you need to download an app called “DS4 Windows” or "DualSenseX" and after that connect your PS4/5 Controller.

# How to install DS4 Windows (PS4 Controllers)
## Step 1
> Download [“Vigem Bus Driver”](https://vigembusdriver.com/download/) which is required for DS4 to work.

## Step 3
> Go to [DS4 Official Download Page](https://ds4-windows.com/download/ryochan7-ds4windows/#) which will automatically download DS4 Windows.
> Once downloaded, run the program to install it.

## Step 4
> Now extract the file and open the newly created "DS4 Windows". Open the "DS4Windows.exe" and you are done.

# How to Install DualSenseX (PS5 Controllers)
## Step 1
> Download [“Vigem Bus Driver”](https://vigembusdriver.com/download/) which is required for DS4 to work.

## Step 2
> Download [Microsoft .NET latest framework](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download).

## Step 3
> Download the free version of DualSenseX, extract the folder using 7zip then run the program to install it.

** **

** **

# How to Download A7-Assist
## Step 1
> [Download A7 assist by clicking here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Uhd2WPtdUvCFWmLmcTN8w_ZnMZu_z9KL/view?usp=drive_link) and clicking the download icon at the top right.

## Step 2
> Extract the "A7-Assist" file using 7zip and open the new “A7 Assist” folder. Drag and Drop the files into *”C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\assettocorsa\extension\lua\joypad-assist”*

## Step 3
> Open Content Manager > Settings > Assetto Corsa > Custom Shaders Patch > Gamepad FX > Active > change Gamepad Script to A7 Assist.

## Step 4
> Go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Axis and at the top it will show Input Method, change it to Gamepad then redo your binds.
